globalRules: Evidence must be backed by Answer Surface, Evidence Container, backend/CMS authority, or artifact-approved source authority.
CTA must be backend/CMS-owned or artifact-governed.
Frontend fallback CTA cannot become domain authority.
Private result/pay/order/take flows are not public evidence targets.

policies.evidence_requirement: Visible result, report, personality, topic, article, answer surface, or Evidence Container support required before public domain claims.
policies.answer_surface_requirement: answer_surface_v1 or equivalent visible report/result explanation.
policies.FAQ_requirement: FAQ can support but cannot be the sole evidence source.
policies.CTA_policy: Existing test/report/personality CTAs remain source-owned; no domain-owned runtime CTA yet.
policies.next_step_policy: Next steps may point to existing tests, reports, or public source-owned surfaces only.
policies.private_flow_policy: Private result/pay/order/take flows are not public evidence targets.
policies.fallback_policy: Frontend fallback CTA cannot become domain authority.

policies.evidence_requirement: Career direction claims require visible career evidence, explainability, caveat, and source authority.
policies.answer_surface_requirement: Career job/recommendation answer or evidence block with visible caveat.
policies.FAQ_requirement: FAQ can support but cannot be the sole evidence source.
policies.CTA_policy: MBTI recommendation CTAs remain snapshot/direction only; no generalized recommender CTA.
policies.next_step_policy: Next steps may support exploration or validation, not precise recommendation.
policies.private_flow_policy: Private result/pay/order/take flows are not public evidence targets.
policies.fallback_policy: Frontend career CTA fallback cannot become domain authority.

policies.evidence_requirement: Visible result/report or answer evidence required before workplace claims.
policies.answer_surface_requirement: Workstyle explanation must be visible and scale-authoritative.
policies.FAQ_requirement: FAQ can support but cannot be the sole evidence source.
policies.CTA_policy: No domain-owned workstyle CTA yet; future DISC/EQ CTAs remain blocked placeholders.
policies.next_step_policy: Next steps may support reflection or report review only.
policies.private_flow_policy: Private result/pay/order/take flows are not public evidence targets.
policies.fallback_policy: Frontend workstyle CTA fallback cannot become domain authority.
